001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import androidx.room.Update;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
009import java.util.List;
010
011/**
012 * Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Incubator entity operations.
013 */
014@Dao
015public interface IncubatorDao {
016
017  /**
018   * Inserts a single incubator into the database.
019   *
020   * @param incubator the incubator to insert
021   * @return the generated incubator ID
022   */
023  @Insert
024  long insert(Incubator incubator);
025
026  /**
027   * Updates an existing incubator in the database.
028   *
029   * @param incubator the incubator to update
030   */
031  @Update
032  void update(Incubator incubator);
033
034  // No @Delete — use @Update to set active=0 for soft deletion.
035
036  /**
037   * Retrieves all active incubators ordered by name as LiveData.
038   *
039   * @return a LiveData list of all active incubators
040   */
041  @Query("SELECT * FROM incubator WHERE active=1 ORDER BY name ASC")
042  LiveData<List<Incubator>> selectAll();
043
044  /**
045   * Retrieves a specific incubator by ID as LiveData.
046   *
047   * @param id the ID of the incubator to retrieve
048   * @return a LiveData containing the incubator with the specified ID
049   */
050  @Query("SELECT * FROM incubator WHERE incubator_id=:id")
051  LiveData<Incubator> select(long id);
052}
